name: add-mcp-tool
description: Add a wrapper MCP tool named `mcp_anyteam_grep` and ensure it is listed by the wrapper's tool probe.
lead_prompt_template: In {repo}, implement wrapper MCP tool `mcp_anyteam_grep` that accepts a regex and directory and returns line-matched results. Add or update tests proving the tool appears in the MCP probe. Assigned target: {assigned_to}.
